recommendations.recommended_value: Consolidate workloads to fewer regions or use VPC endpoints
recommendations.reason: Cross-region data transfer costs $850.00/mo; architectural changes (regional consolidation, caching, endpoint placement) could reduce by up to 30%

recommendations.recommended_value: Co-locate communicating services in the same AZ
recommendations.reason: Cross-AZ transfer costs $360.00/mo; co-locating services in the same AZ could save ~50%

recommendations.recommended_value: Route traffic through CloudFront for egress optimization
recommendations.reason: Direct internet egress costs $125.00/mo; CloudFront could reduce costs by ~40% with better performance

recommendations.recommended_value: Optimize TGW route tables to minimize cross-hub traffic
recommendations.reason: Mixed TGW/peering topology with $1210.00/mo transfer. Optimizing TGW routes could save ~20% on processing costs.
